data.name: Ninja Infiltration
data.detailed_description:
Ayame is a ninja of the Oboro-style, a clan of deadly assassins trained to move as swift as lightning in their mission to deliver judgment to those who deserve it. Her newest assignment is as dangerous as it is important to the newly married ninja: If she succeeds, she can resign honorably and live together with her husband.

The target for her last mission is Amakusa Castle, home of a powerful general rumored to be involved in slave trade. Tasked to uncover the truth, Ayame acts as a mercenary for hire to gain Lord Amakusa’s trust. Forced to follow his crude orders to remain undercover, her mission quickly turns into a test of willpower. Will Ayame be able to keep her senses and return to her husband after the mission is over, or will she succumb under the general’s advances becoming his next concubine?



Experience Ayame’s story across three chapters in the style of a visual novel, with turn-based battle sequences deciding the outcome of her mission. Every combat is a test of Ayame’s willpower, requiring her to resist or allow her opponent’s sexual techniques.







  • Skippable prologue
  • Turn-based combat with sex-battle techniques
  • Multiple endings
  • Reminiscence room

Experience Ayame’s story across three chapters in the style of a visual novel, with turn-based battle sequences deciding the outcome of her mission. Every combat is a test of Ayame’s willpower, requiring her to resist or allow her opponent’s sexual techniques.







  • Skippable prologue
  • Turn-based combat with sex-battle techniques
  • Multiple endings
  • Reminiscence room
data.short_description: Newly married ninja Ayame is assigned her most dangerous mission yet: To infiltrate Lord Amakusa’s castle for an undercover investigation. Acting as a mercenary for hire, it will take all of Ayame’s skill and willpower to uncover the truth and return home to her husband.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 330 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 330 MB 可用空間
